lesson.menu_title: Food and Drinks -- What I Like
lesson.menu_desc: Talk about food, drinks and quantity -- countable/uncountable + some/any -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Food and Drinks: What I Like
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 6 -- Food and Drinks: What I Like

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Luiza. Let me tell you about food and drinks. In the morning, I am very hungry. I eat some bread and some fruit, and I drink a big coffee. I love coffee! At lunch, I have a big meal with my family. I always drink some water with my meal. In the afternoon, I am thirsty, so I drink more water. I do not eat any snacks before dinner, because I want to be healthy. Good food makes me very happy.

Hello, I am Tiago. I want to tell you about the food I like. I am a simple man. For breakfast, I do not eat much. I just drink some coffee and eat a little bread. But I love lunch! At lunch, I am always hungry. My favorite meal is rice with chicken and a fresh fruit. I do not drink any coffee in the afternoon, because I cannot sleep. I drink water or juice. In the evening, I have a small snack and I watch TV. I am happy with simple food.

extra_audio.text: First, at noon Erica is very hungry. Second, she buys some bread and some fruit. Third, she drinks some water. Fourth, she eats her meal with a colleague. Fifth, after lunch she has a small coffee.
